title: euphrasia rostkoviana var. campestris
intro: Euphrasia rostkoviana var. campestris, also known as the common or field eye-catchfly, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Euphrasia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve vision, due to its rich content of iridoids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Euphrasia rostkoviana var. campestris include its potential to treat eye problems such as conjunctivitis, blepharitis, and even some types of vision loss, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Euphrasia rostkoviana var. campestris is typically prepared as a tincture, eye drops, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote eye health and alleviate related symptoms.
